title: HUT Stock Analyst Price Targets and Forecasts
text: HUT Stock Analyst Price Targets: Analyst Rating: Based on 15 analysts, HUT has Strong Buy consensus rating with 67% Strong Buy, 33% Buy, 0% Hold/Sell/Strong Sell. Price Target: Wall Street analysts have set a price target of $101.20, representing 0.00% increase from current stock price. 2026 Forecast: Financial analysts project same target of $101.20 for 2026, though ratings and forecasts are frequently updated based on market conditions, earnings reports, and industry trends. Key Considerations: Information comes from third-party analysts and is not investment advice from Public.com. Extensive disclaimers note that forecasts are subject to change and should not be sole basis for investment decisions. Strong Buy consensus from analyst panel indicates confidence in HUT's prospects despite current valuation.
